summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Proxy Management system for admin UI. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/intel/admin/proxy/status - Returns proxy configuration
POST /api/intel/admin/proxy/add - Successfully adds new proxy
POST /api/intel/admin/proxy/{id}/enable - Enables proxy correctly
POST /api/intel/admin/proxy/{id}/disable - Disables proxy correctly
POST /api/intel/admin/proxy/test - Tests proxy connectivity to Binance/Bybit
DELETE /api/intel/admin/proxy/{id} - Removes proxy successfully
POST /api/intel/admin/proxy/clear - Clears all proxies
GET /api/exchange/providers/health - Exchange providers health endpoint works
Frontend Proxy Admin page loads correctly
Frontend Add Proxy form is visible and functional
Frontend Configured Proxies section displays properly
Frontend proxy actions (enable/disable/remove) work correctly
Frontend Test All button triggers proxy connectivity tests
Frontend Clear All button clears all proxies with confirmation
Frontend navigation between sections works properly
Frontend language toggle (EN/RU) works in API docs
Backend API returns proper JSON responses
Proxy failover logic integrated with Binance and Bybit adapters
All backend tests pass with 100% success rate
Frontend UI is responsive and user-friendly
